blockingIssues.description: The entity graph collapses entities by lowercase label only, so same-label people/organizations/locations merge into one node and type filtering no longer preserves distinct entity types or their co-occurrence edges.
Loading a saved view restores `searchQuery` but not `debouncedSearch`, so saved search filters do not actually reapply to the visible results until the user types again.

appliedUpdates.description: Expanded `.factory/library/user-testing.md` with headless MapLibre GL and canvas-visualization limitations plus recommended validation approaches.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document fallback verification strategies for canvas/WebGL surfaces (coordinate-based clicks, DOM/eval inspection, indirect flows, or API-backed evidence) instead of only requiring standard agent-browser interaction or returning to orchestrator when those surfaces are hard to drive headlessly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two osint-core reviews surfaced the same pattern: entity-relationship-graph required canvas-specific interaction, and cross-area-map-data-flow could not visually verify MapLibre/Globe rendering in headless Chrome. The current skill mentions WebGL/canvas difficulty but does not tell workers what acceptable fallback evidence looks like.
